Insights.Text: Ghana won at home - 3/4 Last Matches

Items.Title: Ghana score late winner to break Panama hearts
Items.Description: Ghana's Caleb Yirenkyi scored a 95th-minute winner to deny Panama their first-ever World Cup point in Toronto, Canada.

Items.Title: Yirenkyi breaks Panama hearts with late Ghana winner
Items.Description: Ghana's Caleb Yirenkyi scores the only goal from close range in the 95th minute to break Panama hearts in their World Cup Group L match in Toronto.

Items.Title: Who are the ITV commentators, pundits and presenters for Ghana vs Panama?
Items.Description: The other game in Group L sees Ghana take on Panama, but who will be in the ITV studio for the match
